title: HERP Insertion Mixture
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4r1kk","text":"This is part of the HERP protocol, from: ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":20,"length":13}],"data":[]},{"key":"dol6f","text":"Alexander WG, Doering DT,and Hittinger CT (2014) High-Efficiency Genome Editing and Allele Replacement in Prototrophic and Wild Strains of Saccharomyces. Genetics 198:859-866; doi:10.1534/genetics.114.170118","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":49,"length":103}],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"ED6112035C1844FA96C7234F1A49A274","url":"https://www.protocols.io/view/HERP-Haploid-Engineering-and-Replacement-Protocol-drq55v"}},"1":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"6D5A08F9F0BB4DD2AE091A61E4C6DBFA","url":"http://www.genetics.org/content/198/3/859.full"}}}}
steps: 240 μL 50% polyethylene glycol, average MW 4000, filter sterilized
36 μL 1 M lithium acetate, filter sterilized
5 μL 20 mg/mL boiled sonicated salmon sperm DNA
79 μL HERP cassette PCR product or water (for control)
